steps.title: Find the broad topic
steps.content: The passage starts with the common idea of winged feathered dinosaurs, then broadens it by saying many wingless dinosaurs also had feathers.

steps.title: Avoid unrelated topics
steps.content: B reverses the focus because the dinosaurs discussed have feathers. C invents fossil value, and D shifts to birds. The topic is dinosaurs with feathers, including winged and wingless examples. The answer is A.
